prompt:
Generate a full-body, front-view portrait of character protagonist based on the following description, with a pure white background. The character should be centered in the image, occupying most of the frame. Gazing straight ahead. Standing with arms relaxed at sides. Natural expression.
Features: Full-body character design, pure white background, centered standing pose, no text, no symbols, no words, no letters, no watermarks.

菜月昴/Subaru Natsuki from 愛x死x機器人/Love, Death & Robots.

4K ultra-high-definition Cubist abstract oil painting, Picasso-style geometric deconstruction, 80% geometric shapes composition using triangles, circles, and rectangles. Bold brushstrokes 0.8-1.8mm thickness, 3.5-7px size, irregular directions. Color saturation 90%, contrast ratio 180:1, primary palette RGB 255,0,0 / RGB 0,0,255 / RGB 255,255,0, sharp crisp color block edges. Multi-dimensional perspective composition combining overhead and eye-level views with 30-degree angular deviation, frame division ratio 2:3:5. Color block layering 5-8 layers at 50-70% opacity, interwoven lines 1.4-2.2px width at density 10 lines/cm. Avant-garde artistic impact maximized.

A strikingly handsome young male figure, 菜月昴 / Subaru Natsuki, deconstructed into sharp geometric planes and fractured Cubist facets. His face is composed of intersecting triangular and rectangular planes — one eye rendered as a piercing golden-amber circle gazing forward with intense charisma, the other a fragmented blue triangle reflecting digital dissolution. His features are angular yet beautiful: high cheekbones defined by crimson geometric slabs, a sharp jawline cut from overlapping yellow and cobalt rectangles, full lips split across two visual planes in vermillion red. His skin tone shifts between warm ochre and cool synthetic silver-blue across fractured facets, suggesting a being caught between flesh and data.

His signature short black hair is rendered as a cascade of jagged dark geometric shards — deep indigo and obsidian triangles spiking outward in chaotic directions, with streaks of electric yellow cutting through like data corruption. His expression is one of haunted intensity mixed with magnetic allure — brows furrowed in existential weight, mouth set in quiet determination, eyes carrying the impossible memory of someone else's peaceful death.

He wears a heavily deconstructed futuristic jacket fragmented into overlapping geometric color blocks — bold primary red panels clash against deep ultramarine blue sections and vivid yellow accent triangles, all layered 5-8 deep with varying transparency. Beneath, a form-fitting dark bodysuit is visible through gaps in the cubist fragmentation, embedded with faint circular motifs suggesting synthetic neural pathways. His collar area features a distinctive asymmetric design — one side high and structured in sharp red rectangles, the other torn open revealing layered blue geometric flesh-data hybrid patterns beneath. His hands are rendered as complex arrangements of interlocking triangles and rectangles, one hand slightly raised with fingers splayed, fingertips dissolving into scattered golden geometric particles drifting upward like uploading consciousness.

His legs and boots are built from stacked rectangular and triangular forms in alternating deep blue and black, with sharp red linear accents running along seams. Around his entire figure, faint geometric ghost-shapes float — fragmented circles and triangles in translucent primary colors representing the "empathy overflow" ability, the shared emotions bleeding beyond his boundaries. His silhouette simultaneously reads as a young man of extraordinary beauty and charisma and as a shattered geometric abstraction questioning the boundaries of self.

菜月昴 / Subaru Natsuki / 愛x死x機器人 / Love, Death & Robots. Full-body character design, absolute 4K clarity, sharp color block edges, powerful visual impact, free artistic expression, pure white background, no text, no symbols, no words., full body, standing pose, arms relaxed at sides, pure white background, character centered, no text, no symbols, no garbled characters, no words
Style: oil_painting
No text, no symbols, no watermark, no garbled characters, no words.
